prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次约 13407→13640→11627→11588→19377，2021–2024 年整体在 11500–13600 区间窄幅波动，2025 年因陕西首年新高考（物理类）及招生专业组细分，最低位次大幅后移至约 19377 名，较 2024 年基准后移约 7789 名，波动显著；该校在陕西理科/物理类计划：2021 年 47 人、2022 年 47 人、2023 年 46 人、2024 年 44 人、2025 年 48 人；2026 年物理类计划大幅扩至 72 人，较 2025 年增加 24 人（增幅 50%），扩招力度较大，对位次有显著后推作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 65 名稳步上升至 2026 年第 52 名，近年排名持续提升，学校综合实力与认可度呈上升趋势；2023 年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面（学校管理相关事件），但 2024–2026 年声誉文件中无江南大学新增负面记录；抖音综合热度排名第 71 位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量处于中游，未见明显报考关注升温信号；轻工技术与工程 A+、食品科学与工程 A+，均为全国顶尖水平；食品科学与工程对应招生专业（食品科学与工程、食品营养与健康等），轻工技术与工程对应纺织工程等专业，学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等热门专业 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，江南大学在上述领域均有招生，对考生有一定吸引力；但食品科学与工程所属的"生化环材"大类整体明显劝退，可能抑制相关专业报考热度。陕西省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增加约 34032 人（增幅约 19.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；省控线因新高考模式变化不可直接对比，；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属跨省报考；该校在陕西招生占比约 1.4%–1.8%（2024 年 11 人/全国 759 人），非主要生源省份，无明显地域偏好或排斥信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的基准、2026 年物理类计划大幅扩招 50%（按供需弹性计算位次后移至约 25190 名）、陕西省物理类考生增加约 19.7% 加剧竞争（对位次有前推作用），以及学校排名稳步上升、声誉中性、专业热度分化等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次在 25190 名基础上小幅前移约 300 名，预测最低位次约 24890 名，区间 24390–25390 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (including physics category) was approximately 13407 → 13640 → 11627 → 11588 → 19377. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated narrowly within the 11500–13600 range. In 2025, due to Shaanxi's first year of the new college entrance examination (physics category) and the subdivision of enrollment major groups, the minimum ranking significantly dropped to about 19377, a shift of approximately 7789 places compared to the 2024 baseline, indicating notable volatility. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Shaanxi: 47 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 48 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan expands significantly to 72, an increase of 24 (50% increase) compared to 2025, with a substantial expansion that significantly pushes the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, indicating an upward trend in the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluations were somewhat negative (related to university management incidents), but from 2024 to 2026, no new negative records for Jiangnan University appeared in reputation documents. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (rated as 'average'), with short video platform exposure at a mid-level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention. Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, and Food Science and Engineering is A+, both at the national top level. Food Science and Engineering corresponds to enrollment majors (Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, etc.), and Light Industry Technology and Engineering corresponds to majors like Textile Engineering, with strong disciplinary strength, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. Jiangnan University offers enrollment in these fields, attracting some applicants. However, Food Science and Engineering, belonging to the broader 'Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials' category, is generally discouraged, potentially suppressing application enthusiasm for related majors. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (approximately 19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, with a significant expansion in the examinee pool, intensifying competition. The provincial control line cannot be directly compared due to the new college entrance examination model. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, which is a cross-province application. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4%–1.8% (11 out of 759 nationally in 2024), not a major source province, with no clear signals of regional preference or aversion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of a significant ranking drop in 2025, a 50% expansion in the 2026 physics category enrollment plan (with the ranking shifting to approximately 25190 based on supply-demand elasticity), an approximately 19.7% increase in Shaanxi physics category examinees intensifying competition (which pushes the ranking forward), along with the university's steadily rising ranking, neutral reputation, and divergent major popularity, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward by about 300 places from the 25190 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24890, with a range of 24390–25390.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 24890, range 24390–25390. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Internet of Things Engineering, Optoelectronic Information, Robotics Engineering, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation Excellence Class, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Engineering) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (A+ majors like Food Science and Engineering, Textile Engineering) as safe choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<24390), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors; for rankings near the upper bound (>25390), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024 年文科最低位次约 3697→3348→2551→2353，整体呈逐年前移趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），近 4 年累计前移约 1344 名；2025 年该校在陕西未招收文科/历史类考生，无当年基准位次；2021–2023 年文科计划均为 12 人，2024 年增至 14 人；2025 年无文科/历史类招生；2026 年历史类计划 11 人，较 2024 年文科减少 3 人（缩招约 21.4%），缩招对位次有前推作用（竞争加剧）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 65 名升至 2026 年第 52 名，排名稳步上升，学校综合实力增强；2023 年声誉偏负面（学校管理事件），但近年无新增负面记录；抖音热度一般（排名第 71），未出现报考关注显著升温信号；轻工技术与工程 A+、食品科学与工程 A+，均为顶尖水平，但文科招生专业（法学、汉语言文学、社会工作、思想政治教育、日语）与上述优势学科无直接关联，学科优势对文科报考的拉动作用有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度推荐但竞争分化，汉语言文学/中文类推荐，师范/教育类分化观望；陕西省 2026 年历史类考生约 88500 人，较 2025 年 75641 人增加约 12859 人（增幅约 17%），考生规模扩大，竞争加剧；省控线因新高考模式变化不可直接对比，；江南大学位于江苏无锡，跨省报考；在陕西文科招生占比极小（2024 年约 14 人），无明显地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024 年文科位次 2353 名基准、2026 年历史类计划缩招（11 人 vs 2024 年 14 人）、陕西省历史类考生增加约 17% 加剧竞争，以及学校排名上升、声誉中性等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2353 名基础上小幅前移约 50 名，预测最低位次约 2303 名，区间 1889–2717 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 3697→3348→2551→2353, showing a year-by-year forward trend (ranking numbers decrease, competition intensifies), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1344 places over the past 4 years; in 2025, the university did not recruit liberal arts/history category examinees in Shaanxi, so there is no baseline ranking for that year; the liberal arts enrollment plan was 12 students from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 14 in 2024; in 2025, there was no liberal arts/history category enrollment; in 2026, the history category plan is 11 students, a decrease of 3 students (a reduction of about 21.4%) compared to the 2024 liberal arts plan, and the enrollment reduction has a forward-pushing effect on rankings (intensifying competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking rose from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, showing steady improvement in ranking and enhanced overall strength; in 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (due to a university management incident), but there have been no new negative records in recent years; Douyin popularity is average (ranked 71st), with no significant signal of increased application attention; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, both at the top level, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Social Work, Ideological and Political Education, Japanese) are not directly related to these advantageous disciplines, so the disciplinary advantages have limited pull on liberal arts applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but competition is polarized; Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese majors are recommended; teacher training/education majors are polarized and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (an increase of about 17%) compared to 75,641 in 2025, expanding the examinee pool and intensifying competition; the provincial control line cannot be directly compared due to changes in the new college entrance examination model; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, and is a cross-province application; the proportion of liberal arts enrollment in Shaanxi is very small (about 14 students in 2024), with no obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2024 liberal arts ranking baseline of 2353, the 2026 history category enrollment reduction (11 students vs. 14 in 2024), the approximately 17% increase in history category examinees in Shaanxi intensifying competition, as well as factors such as the university's rising ranking and neutral reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift forward slightly by about 50 places from the 2353 baseline, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 2303, and a range of 1889–2717.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 2303, with a range of 1889–2717. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Ideological and Political Education, Japanese), use Tier 1 majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Social Work) as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<1889), focus on reaching for Law; for rankings near the upper bound of the range (>2717), it is recommended to use Social Work as a safety option.
